description: Initial creative spark or uploaded script material.
Evaluate genre clarity, marketability, and AI production feasibility.
Generate the time, space, conflict, tone, and world rules.
Design character identity, motivation, relationships, and visual rules.
Create or rewrite episode scripts with scene descriptions and dialogue.
Generate character visuals, scene concepts, props, and style references.
Plan shots, scene order, camera angles, and camera movement.
Generate and review final short drama video assets.
